  have hmul : ПҮ 1 * ПҮ 1 = ПҮ 1 := by

      ПҮ 1 * ПҮ 1 = ПҮ (1 * 1) := by rw [map_mul]
      _ = ПҮ 1 := by simp
  have hcancel : ПҮ 1 = 1 := by
    exact mul_left_cancelвӮҖ hmul
  exact hcancel
```

  calc
    ПҮ 1 * ПҮ 1 = ПҮ (1 * 1) := by rw [map_mul]
    _ = ПҮ 1 := by simp
  have hmul : ПҮ 1 * ПҮ 1 = ПҮ 1 := by
    calc
      ПҮ 1 * ПҮ 1 = ПҮ (1 * 1) := by rw [map_mul]
      _ = ПҮ 1 := by simp
  have hcancel := mul_right_cancelвӮҖ hmul
  simpa using hcancel
```
